claims.statement: Bronto now ships a Tailwind v4 CSS bridge before adding more components.
claims.scope: `@ponchia/ui` package exports, Tailwind interop docs, and packed examples as of 2026-06-12 after this pass.

claims.statement: Thin Svelte and Vue lifecycle adapters fit Bronto's architecture better than per-framework components or Web Components, and now ship locally.
claims.scope: Behavior-layer adoption surfaces and examples, not new component markup.

claims.statement: The token-system improvement is now a local Figma Variables handoff, not a bundled Style Dictionary dependency.
claims.scope: Token exports, docs, and offline handoff artifacts.

claims.statement: Bronto should not chase a broad shadcn/Radix-style catalog as the next SOTA move.
claims.scope: Roadmap prioritization and public package surface.

claims.statement: Bronto now covers persistent background-job status as a CSS-first state primitive instead of leaving async work hidden in transient toasts.
claims.scope: `@ponchia/ui/css/state.css`, generated class/type metadata, state docs, state demo, and cross-browser non-pixel tests.

claims.statement: Bronto now covers accessible workbench split panes without becoming a drag-and-drop or layout-persistence framework.
claims.scope: `@ponchia/ui/css/workbench.css`, delegated behavior exports, framework bindings, generated class/metadata artifacts, workbench docs/demo, and cross-browser non-pixel tests.

claims.statement: The current local quality gate found no confirmed AI-slop or dead-code defects, and the unit, non-pixel Playwright, plus packed-example browser suites passed.
claims.scope: Local deterministic scans, unit/contract tests, real-browser non-pixel suite, and packed-example suite run on 2026-06-12.

claims.statement: The confirmed documentation, changelog, and roadmap drifts found in this pass were fixed locally.
claims.scope: `docs/theming.md` accent-strength wording; controlled-modal usage/reference, type-comment, and classes-metadata wording; adapter-contract docs; `CHANGELOG.md` unreleased notes; and `ROADMAP.md` reconciliation status.

sources.title: Local repository/package inventory
sources.origin: Local `package.json`, exported paths, docs, examples, bindings, token artifacts, size report, theming-doc patch, controlled-modal documentation/generator patches, adapter-doc cleanup, Vue derived directive-surface test, background-job primitive/docs/demo/tests, workbench splitter primitive/docs/demo/tests, splitter declaration freshness, shared static-server helper cleanup, smoke assertion helper cleanup, changelog/roadmap reconciliation, and local browser-gate script docs.

sources.title: Local deterministic quality scans
sources.origin: Repo-local dead-code and AI-slop reports under `code-quality-audits/2026-06-12-expansion-research/`, plus latest follow-up reports under `code-quality-audits/2026-06-12-ai-slop-followup-3/` and `code-quality-audits/2026-06-12-dead-code-followup-3/`; `npm run check` passed; `npm test` (245 passed), `npm run test:e2e:nonpixel` (597 passed, 9 intentional skips), `npm run test:examples` (9 packed builds, 7 browser smokes), source-scoped Trivy was clean, and jscpd script clones were reduced from 13 to 11 after static-server/smoke-helper cleanup.

sources.title: Comparable design-system adoption surfaces
sources.origin: Radix Themes, shadcn/ui, Ark UI, Shoelace, and React Aria public docs.

sources.title: Token exchange and Figma Variables standards
Progress and status pattern references
sources.origin: Atlassian Progress indicator, Carbon Progress indicator/status patterns, Material Design 3 progress indicators, Material Web progress, and recent background-work UX pattern research.

sources.title: Accessible splitter and resize-pane references
sources.origin: WAI-ARIA APG Window Splitter, MDN separator role, React Resizable Panels, Salt Splitter accessibility, Radix Vue Splitter, and shadcn Resizable public references.
